name: LottieFiles
description: Platform for creating, editing, testing, and sharing Lottie animations — lightweight JSON-based motion graphics for web and mobile apps. Includes a visual Lottie editor and marketplace.

seo.title: LottieFiles — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: LottieFiles: Platform for creating, editing, testing, and sharing Lottie animations — lightweight JSON-based motion graphics for web and mobile apps. Includes a

when_to_use: Loading spinner animated in After Effects and exported as Lottie
Onboarding illustration animated and shipped at 10KB JSON
Lottie animation previewed and optimized before React embed
Animation marketplace asset downloaded and customized
Motion designer shared Lottie file directly to frontend engineer

pros: Visual editor, testers, and handoff all in one place
Lightweight JSON animations vs heavy video or GIFs
Solid integrations with Figma and After Effects
cons: Pricing has crept up for team plans
Web player performance can regress on low-end devices
Competitors like Lottielab now match key features
review.verdict: The default hub for Lottie workflows, but evaluate Lottielab if you want web-first editing over ecosystem breadth.
review.best_for: Design and product teams integrating Lottie animations across web and mobile apps.
review.not_for: Solo designers needing only a lightweight web editor or teams avoiding subscription tools.
